package rulecoverage

func NegativeModelToDtoMappingInHandler() string {
    ruleID := "model_to_dto_mapping_in_handler"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Handlers that manually shape every response from persistence structs rather than using dedicated mapping helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
